description.en: A dictionary of additional attributes for process creation as given in STARTUPINFOEX, see UpdateProcThreadAttribute. Supported attributes: handle_listSequence of handles that will be inherited. close_fds must be true if non-empty. The handles must be temporarily made inheritable by os.set_handle_inheritable() when passed to the Popen constructor, else OSError will be raised with Windows error ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER (87). Warning In a multithreaded process, use caution to avoid leaking handle...
